chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-352 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 07.05.2026 Ms.Munawar Fatima, Advocate for the applicant Ms.Sana Memon, A.P.G for the State ****** Learned counsel for the applicant has placed on record a certified copy of Order dated 08.04.2026, passed in Criminal Case No.04/2026, by the Judicial Magistrate-II, Badin, wherein it appears that the applicant/accused No.2 Varun Kumar has entered into a compromise with the complainant, which has been accepted by the trial Court, and the applicant/accused has been acquitted under Section 345 Cr.P.C. Accordingly, the instant bail application has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of in above terms. The surety stands discharged. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
